signal_title: FTC's Enforcement Statement on Automated Systems
risk_rationale: The FTC's enforcement statement on automated systems introduces a material compliance gap concerning biases and discrimination in automated systems, which may require immediate product changes to ensure compliance with US regulations.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Algorithm transparency - Regulator access upon formal request
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Application of laws to automated systems, addressing biases and discrimination
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The current baseline focuses on transparency and regulator access but does not explicitly address biases and discrimination in automated systems.

remediations.title: Bias and Discrimination Mitigation in Automated Systems
remediations.description: Implement measures to identify, assess, and mitigate biases and discrimination in TikTok's automated systems, ensuring compliance with FTC guidance.
acceptance_criteria: Regular audits for discrimination in automated systems

business_impact: Failure to address biases and discrimination in automated systems could lead to regulatory scrutiny, potential fines, and reputational damage in the US market.
recommended_actions: Conduct a comprehensive audit of automated systems for biases
Engage with legal and compliance teams to align with FTC guidance
